description_long: This is a round, yellow stuffed toy modeled after Pikachu, a popular character from the Pokémon franchise. The toy features two prominent, pointed ears with black tips, large black eyes, and a small, smiling mouth. Red circular patches are present on both cheeks, adding to its recognizable appearance. The body is spherical with four stubby limbs, two arms and two legs, all attached to the lower half of the toy. The surface appears soft and plush, with a matte finish typical of fabric-covered stuffed toys. There are no visible seams, clothing, or accessories, and the back is plain yellow with no additional markings.
description: A round, yellow Pikachu stuffed toy with black-tipped ears, red cheeks, and a smiling face. It has a soft, plush surface and four stubby limbs.
description_view_0: Front view showing Pikachu's face, black eyes, red cheeks, smiling mouth, and both ears clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one ear, a red cheek, and the rounded body with one arm and leg more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain yellow back and both black-tipped ears, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Angled view from the other side, showing the opposite cheek, ear, and limbs, with part of the face visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful, with a small, curved smile and wide, round black eyes. The red cheeks enhance the friendly and happy appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The toy is in a sitting posture with its four stubby limbs slightly spread out from its round body and ears pointing upward.
